prompt: Editorial luxury architectural photography meets digital work, 16:9. Exterior of a modern Scottsdale commercial building at golden hour — clean stucco walls in warm sand tones, desert landscaping with large saguaro cactus, soft amber sky. In the foreground, slightly blurred: a premium tablet or iPad Pro on a stone surface displaying a clean website wireframe or pricing table with clear typography. Shallow depth of field keeps the architecture sharp in the midground, tablet edges soft. Natural desert warm light. Color palette: warm sand #d4c4a0, deep amber shadows, burgundy #7a1c1c small accent on screen. 85mm lens, f/2.4, ISO 200. Hyper-realistic architectural photography. Visible stucco texture, natural sky gradient, real desert plants. No people. No CGI. Cinematic editorial tone.
negative_prompt: cartoon, CGI, plastic, overexposed, neon, blue cold tones, stock photo, people, faces, generic office, flat lighting, oversaturated, blurry foreground
